headline: UP CEO says no thanks to potential government investment in $85B merger
summary: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena stated the company can afford its $85 billion Norfolk Southern merger without federal investment. The post UP CEO says no thanks to potential government investment in $85B merger appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Anti-AI Investing: The HALO Moat Goes Off The Rails
summary: North American railroads like UNP, NSC, CSX, CNI, and CP exhibit HALO traits: irreplaceable heavy assets, low obsolescence, and durable cash flows.
